fetch_raw_data: /* 1. ADIM: REÇETELİ SATIŞLAR (ISNULL KORUMALI) */
WITH R_Satis AS (
SELECT
ra.RxIslemTarihi AS satis_tarihi,
CASE ra.RxReceteTipi WHEN 1 THEN 'sgk_recete' WHEN 11 THEN 'perakende_recete' WHEN 50 THEN 'cezaevi_recete' ELSE 'bilinmeyen_recete' END AS satis_tipi,
ri.RIUrunId AS urun_id, ri.RIAdet AS satis_adedi,
/* ISNULL ekleyerek NULL değerleri 0'a zorluyoruz */

ISNULL(CAST((ri.RIToplam + ri.RIFiyatFarki - ABS(ri.RIToplam * rh.RHIskontoToplam / NULLIF(rh.RHReceteToplam,0)) + (rh.RHYuvarlama * ((ri.RIToplam + ri.RIFiyatFarki) - (ri.RIToplam * rh.RHIskontoToplam / NULLIF(rh.RHReceteToplam,0))) / NULLIF((rh.RHReceteToplam + rh.RHFiyatFarki - rh.RHIskontoToplam),0))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS net_tutar,
ISNULL(CAST(ABS(ri.RIToplam * rh.RHIskontoToplam / NULLIF(rh.RHReceteToplam,0)) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS indirim
FROM ReceteIlaclari ri
JOIN ReceteAna ra ON ra.RxId = ri.RIRxId
LEFT JOIN ReceteHesap rh ON rh.RHRxId = ri.RIRxId
WHERE ra.RxIslemTarihi >= DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE()) AND ri.RISilme = 0 AND ra.RxSilme = 0
/* 2. ADIM: ELDEN SATIŞLAR (ISNULL KORUMALI) */
E_Satis AS (
SELECT
ea.RxIslemTarihi AS satis_tarihi, 'nakit_satis' AS satis_tipi, ei.RIUrunId AS urun_id, ei.RIAdet AS satis_adedi,
/* ISNULL ekleyerek NULL değerleri 0'a zorluyoruz */

ISNULL(CAST((ei.RIToplam - ABS(ISNULL(ei.RIToplam * eh.RHIskontoToplam / NULLIF(eh.RHEtiketToplam,0),0)) + ISNULL(ei.RIToplam * eh.RHYuvarlama / NULLIF(eh.RHEtiketToplam,0),0)) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS net_tutar,
ISNULL(CAST(ABS(ISNULL(ei.RIToplam * eh.RHIskontoToplam / NULLIF(eh.RHEtiketToplam,0),0)) AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) AS indirim
FROM EldenIlaclari ei
JOIN EldenAna ea ON ea.RxId = ei.RIRxId
LEFT JOIN EldenHesap eh ON eh.RHRxId = ei.RIRxId
WHERE ea.RxIslemTarihi >= DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE()) AND ei.RISilme = 0 AND ea.RxSilme = 0
/* 3, 4 ve 5. ADIMLAR AYNI KALIYOR */
TumSatislar AS (SELECT * FROM R_Satis UNION ALL SELECT * FROM E_Satis),
SatilanUrunIDler AS (SELECT DISTINCT urun_id FROM TumSatislar),
UrunMetadata AS (
SELECT U.UrunId,
(SELECT TOP 1 BarkodAdi FROM Barkod WHERE BarkodUrunId = U.UrunId ORDER BY BarkodId DESC) AS barkod,
U.UrunAdi AS lokal_urun_adi, (COALESCE(U.UrunStokDepo,0) + COALESCE(U.UrunStokRaf,0)) AS stok_adet, U.UrunFiyatEtiket AS lokal_psf,

ISNULL(STUFF((SELECT '|' + '20' + SUBSTRING(XD, 1, 2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(XD, 3, 2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(XD, 5, 2) + ':' + CAST(COUNT(KKId) AS VARCHAR) FROM Karekod WHERE KKUrunId = U.UrunId AND KKDurum = 1 AND XD > '000000' GROUP BY XD ORDER BY XD ASC FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 1, ''), 'YOK') AS miad_dagilimi,

ISNULL(STUFF((SELECT TOP 5 '|' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), FG.FGFaturaTarihi, 120) + ':' + CAST(FS.FSUrunAdet AS VARCHAR) + '+' + CAST(FS.FSUrunMf AS VARCHAR) + '@' + ISNULL(D.DepoAdi, 'Bilinmeyen') FROM FaturaSatir FS JOIN FaturaGiris FG ON FS.FSFGId = FG.FGId LEFT JOIN Depo D ON FG.FGIlgiliId = D.DepoId WHERE FS.FSUrunId = U.UrunId AND FG.FGSilme = 0 AND FS.FSUrunAdet > 0 ORDER BY FG.FGFaturaTarihi DESC FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 1, ''), 'AL_YOK') AS son_5_alim_dagilimi,

ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 DepoAdi FROM (SELECT TOP 5 D.DepoAdi FROM FaturaSatir FS JOIN FaturaGiris FG ON FS.FSFGId = FG.FGId JOIN Depo D ON FG.FGIlgiliId = D.DepoId WHERE FS.FSUrunId = U.UrunId AND FG.FGSilme = 0 ORDER BY FG.FGFaturaTarihi DESC) AS L5 GROUP BY DepoAdi ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, MAX(DepoAdi)), 'DEPO_YOK') AS favori_depo
FROM Urun U JOIN SatilanUrunIDler SID ON U.UrunId = SID.urun_id
WHERE U.UrunAktif = 1 AND U.UrunSilme = 0
FinalData AS (
SELECT TS.*, M.barkod, M.lokal_urun_adi, M.stok_adet, M.lokal_psf, M.miad_dagilimi, M.son_5_alim_dagilimi, M.favori_depo,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TS.urun_id ORDER BY TS.satis_tarihi DESC) as Sira
FROM TumSatislar TS JOIN UrunMetadata M ON TS.urun_id = M.UrunId

SELECT 'botanik' AS program, barkod, lokal_urun_adi, satis_tipi, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), satis_tarihi, 120) AS satis_tarihi, satis_adedi, stok_adet, lokal_psf, net_tutar, indirim, miad_dagilimi, son_5_alim_dagilimi, favori_depo
FROM FinalData ORDER BY satis_tarihi DESC
